ab: izua za ku salasaladj a ti Uljelje, ru draudrav a kemacu tua nemanga nimadju.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Uljelje，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Uljelje, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: nu kitulutulu amen, kisedjam timadju tua salasaladj ta inpic, siquliqulip katua vaveikan a laqulj/zakitju.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: puita, pudrusa, putjelu, nia pasedjam sakamaya timadja.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ljakua, izua za nakuyakuya a sikudakudan nimadju, inika ru pacikel tua kinisedjam a nemanga.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: ta vililjanga, nekanga nu salasaladj a pasapasedjam tjaimadju.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: izua tu ita qadav, vaik amen a maciyuciyur a kivangavang.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ta i djalan amen, manu malingav ti Uljelje, ljakua inika napaqenetj a kemacu tua siidjuadjuas.
ch: 路途中，Uljelje想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Uljelje wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: saka patjanemain a salasaladj tua sikidjuadjuas, tevelain a mayatucu, inika men a nakemacu uta ayain.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: qemaung anga ti Uljelje tua uwalan. madudu a qivu, awa inika mun a pasedjam tjanuaken tua sikidjuadjuas aya!
ch: Uljelje急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Uljelje burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: qaqivuin nua salasaladj a mayatucu, ayatua inika sun a nakemacu, saka nu tja pasedjaman sun ta nemanga, inika sun a pacikecikel uta!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: ta maljiya, namedjama anga ti Uljelje i gakku, saka pacikeli a kinisedjam a nemanga tua mareka salasaladj a penuljat.
ch: 隔天上學，Uljelje很早就到學校了，Uljelje把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Uljelje arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: pudjavadjavai tua mareka salasaladj ti Uljelje, saka qivu a mayatucu, kiken a kemacu anga tua ku nemanga nutjaivililj, saka pumaljimalji tua mareka salasaladj tua pinasedjaman tjaimadju a pasusangas anga a qadav.
ch: Uljelje向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Uljelje  apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
